folksonomy.title: Motor de folksonomia
folksonomy.subtitle: Explorador de claus
folksonomy.description: Folksonomy permet als utilizaires d'apondre d'etiquetas personalizadas als produches. Consultatz totas las claus disponiblas çai-jos, cercatz de claus especificas, o clicatz sus quina clau que siá per veire los produches que l'utilizan.
folksonomy.progress_bar: Usage frequency indicator: {percent}% relative to other keys

key_visualization_guide.title: Key Visualization Guide:
key_visualization_guide.badge_products_end: shows the number of products using this key
key_visualization_guide.badge_values_end: shows the number of unique values for this key
key_visualization_guide.progress_bar: The progress bar represents how commonly the key is used relative to other keys

home.intro_1: Open Food Facts Explorer es una aisina per explorar la basa de donadas de Open Food Facts.
home.intro_2: Podètz picar un còde de produch dins la barra de recèrca çai-sus per començar o clicar sus un dels produches çai-jos.

preferences.subtitle: Your preferences are kept in your browser and never sent to Open Food Facts or anyone else.

preferences.default_description: Nutri-Score, Green-Score and food processing level (NOVA)

folksonomy.intro_before: These properties are created and filled by users for any kind of usages. Feel free to add your own. The properties and values you create
folksonomy.link_properties: the list of properties already used by the community
folksonomy.link_docs: properties' documentation and its search engine
folksonomy.warning: Atencion que lo modèl de donadas pòt èsser modificat. Utilizar a vòstre risc.
folksonomy.footer_after: . Don't hesitate to participate or give feedback.

datasources.title: Fonts de donadas
datasources.also_checked_by: La pagina de produch tanben verificada per
datasources.last_modified_t: Darrièra modificacion de la pagina de produch sus {date} per
datasources.incomplete_or_incorrect: If the data is incomplete or incorrect, you can complete or correct it by editing this page.
datasources.check_be_first: Be the first to check this product

info.images: Enviatz d'imatges clars del produch, dels ingredients e dels faches nutricionals per ajudar los autres a identificar lo produch.
info.basic_info: Fornir los detalhs principals sul produch, coma la quantitat, l'embalatge e lo fabricant.
info.origin_traceability: Provide origin and traceability information, such as manufacturing places, origins of ingredients, and traceability codes.
info.languages: Apondètz de noms de produch e de descripcions dins de lengas diferentas per rendre lo produch accessible a mai d'utilizaires.
info.ingredients: Listar totes los ingredients presents dins lo produch. Aquò ajuda los utilizaires amb d'allergias o de preferéncias alimentàrias.
info.nutrition: Picatz de valors nutricionalas per 100g/ml coma mostrat sus l'embalatge. Aquò ajuda los utilizaires a comparar los produches.
info.moderator_tools: These tools are only available to moderators. They allow for administrative actions like correcting the product barcode.
info.prices: Help track this product's price history on Open Prices.
info.comment: Opcionalament, apondètz un comentari per descriure vòstras modificacions o provesir un contèxte suplementari.
info.packaging: Describe each packaging component (bottle, cap, box, etc.) with its shape, material, and recycling instructions. You can add multiple components.

tooltips.serving_size: Aquesta valor ajuda a far un calcul proporcional de cada nutriment per talha de porcion. Per exemple, 60 g, 60g o 60 G (preferís lo primièr), 1000 ml o 1L
tooltips.ingredients_list: Keep the original order. Indicate the percentage when specified. Separate with a comma or hyphen and use parentheses for ingredients of an ingredient.
tooltips.categories: Indicatz solament la categoria mai especifica. Las categorias parentas seràn automaticament apondudas. Per exemple, 'Sardinas dins l'òli d'oliva', 'Juc d'iranja de concentrat'.
tooltips.product_name: Lo nom del produch es lo nom principal estampat sus l'embalatge. Pòt èsser una marca registrada. Per exemple, 'Nesquik', 'Tomate Ketchup'. Inclutz pas la marca dins lo nom
tooltips.brand_name: Picatz totas las marcas del produch. La marca principala, generalament clarament afichada sul paquet davancièr, deu èsser introducha primièr. Per exemple, ‘Nutella, ‘Oreo, Mondelez’.
tooltips.quantity: Copiatz la valor indicada sul produch e oblidetz pas las unitats. Per exemple, 230g, 6(per 6 uòus), 3 x 150g (per un produch amb 3 bóstias, caduna de 150g).
tooltips.labels: Tota caracteristica del produch **qu'es factuala** e diferenta dels autres camps. Per exemple, 'Nutri-Score, NOVA…', 'Made in Belgium, produit en Bretanha…', 'ISO 9001, ISO 22000…'.
tooltips.stores: Picatz la botiga ont avètz crompat lo produch. Per exemple, 'Carrefour', 'Walmart', 'Lidl'.
tooltips.origins: Apondètz totas las indicacions d'originas que podètz trobar sus l'embalatge. Avètz pas besonh de vos preocupar de las originas indicadas dirèctament dins la lista dels ingredients. Per exemple, 'La carn de bœuf d'Argentina', 'La sòja ven pas de l'Union Europèa'.
tooltips.traceability_code: Dins aquesta seccion, podètz picar de còdes ligats a las marcas d'embalatge, a las marcas d'identificacion o a las marcas de santat.
tooltips.countries: Los païses ont lo produch es largament disponible (sens inclure las botigas especializadas en produches estrangièrs).
tooltips.product_type: Select the type of product: Food, Beauty, Pet Food, or Other.
tooltips.empty_fiber: Enter a hyphen (-) if the value is not present on the packaging.
tooltips.allergens: List the allergens present in the product (e.g. Milk, Gluten, Eggs).
tooltips.traces: List any traces of allergens that may be present due to cross-contamination (e.g. Nuts, Soy).

edit.nutrition_issues_description: We have detected some potential issues with the nutritional information you provided. Please review the following warnings and make any necessary corrections before saving your changes.
edit.name: Nom

packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_label: Quantity of product contained per unit
packaging_component.all_listed: All packaging components have been listed
packaging_component.number_of_units_desc: Enter the number of packaging units of the same shape and material contained in the product.
packaging_component.shape_desc: Enter the shape name listed in the recycling instructions if they are available, or select a shape.
packaging_component.material_desc: Enter the specific material if it can be determined (a material code inside a triangle can often be found on packaging parts), or a generic material (for instance plastic or metal) if you are unsure.
packaging_component.recycling_desc: Enter recycling instructions only if they are listed on the product.
packaging_component.weight_measured_desc: Remove any remaining food and wash and dry the packaging part before weighting. If possible, use a scale with 0.1g or 0.01g precision.
packaging_component.quantity_per_unit_desc: Enter the net weight or net volume and indicate the unit (for example g or ml).
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_desc: Write here the packaging information and/or the recycling instructions that are present on the product.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_list: List all packaging parts separated by a comma or line feed, with their amount (e.g. 1 or 6) type (e.g. bottle, box, can), material (e.g. plastic, metal, aluminium) and if available their size (e.g. 33cl) and recycling instructions.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_specificity: Try to be as specific as possible. For plastic, please indicate if it is opaque or transparent, colored, PET or PEHD.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_combination: Data from this field will be combined with any data provided for each packaging part. It is possible to provide one or the other, or both.
packaging_component.recycling_instructions_examples: 1 plastic film to discard, 1 FSC carboard box to recycle, 6 1.5L transparent PET plastic bottles to recycle, 6 colored opaque plastic caps, 12 33cl aluminium cans
packaging_component.packaging_photo_desc: Photos of the packaging info and recycling instructions help to verify the data.
packaging_component.multiple_uploads_guidance: With Chrome, Firefox and Safari, you can select multiple pictures (product, ingredients, nutrition facts etc.) by clicking them while holding the Ctrl key pressed to add them all in one shot.

edit.origins: Origin of the product and/or its ingredients
edit.product_page_url_add: Link to the product page on the official site of the producer
edit.generic_name_placeholder: e.g., Chocolate chip cookies, Orange juice

edit.no_nutrition_specified: Pas de donadas de nutricion especificadas
edit.comment_placeholder: Ajustar un comentari a aquesta modificacion

toast.save_error: Failed to save product. Please try again.

edit.legal_warning_title: Enviatz pas d'imatges protegits pels dreches d'autor
edit.legal_warning_photos_1: Enviatz pas de fòtos que possedissètz pas o qu'avètz pas los dreches. Enviar d'imatges protegits pels dreches d'autor sens autorizacion es illegal e pòt entraïnar vòstre compte suspendut.
edit.legal_warning_photos_2: Mandatz pas que vòstras pròprias fòtos o aquelas qu'avètz l'autorizacion explicita d'utilizar.

landing.title: Dobrir l'explorator de faches alimentaris
landing.subtitle: Una basa de donadas collaborativa, liura e dobèrta de produches alimentaris del mond entièr. Descobrissètz, cercatz e contribuissètz a la transparéncia alimentària per totes.
landing.explore_products_desc: Consultatz de milions de produches alimentaris, veire los faches nutricionals, e far de causidas informadas.
landing.help_improve_desc: Help us improve Open Food Facts by editing or answering questions about these products.

dashboard.html_title: Perfil d'utilizaire - {user} - Open Food Facts Explorer
dashboard.title: Perfil d'utilizaire de {user}

explore.title: Explora los faches de l'alimentacion dobèrta
explore.subtitle: Descobrissètz de produches de mòda, de categorias popularas, e contribuissètz a la transparéncia alimentària!
explore.trending_products_desc: Vejatz quines produches son lo mai vistes e modificats ara.
explore.popular_categories_desc: Consultatz las categorias de noiridura mai popularas dins nòstra basa de donadas.
explore.recently_added_desc: Consultatz los darrièrs produches aponduts per la comunautat.
explore.contribute_now_desc: Ajudatz a melhorar los faches alimentaris dobèrts en apondent o en modificant de produches, o en respondent a de questions.
explore.random_product_desc: Te sentisses afortunat? Descobrissètz un produch aleatòri dempuèi nòstra basa de donadas.
explore.learn_more_desc: Descobrissètz cossí fonciona Open Food Facts e cossí podètz ajudar.
